title: Grilled Lardon and Bacon Baguette
description: A twist on the classic Mexican street food, this grilled baguette is filled with crispy lardon and bacon.
instructions: Preheat comal or grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the baguette in half lengthwise.
Place the baguette on the comal or grill and toast until lightly browned.
In a pan, cook the lardon and bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the lardon and bacon from the pan and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Assemble the baguette by spreading the garlic on the bottom half, followed by the lardon and bacon.
Top with the top half of the baguette.
Cut the baguette in half and serve immediately.
